// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;

[Flags]
public enum CasePatternEnumFormat : byte
{
    None = 0,
    Name = 1,
    Value = 2,
    Default = Name | Value
}
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;

public static partial class Enums
{
    public static partial class CasePatternEnum
    {
        public const int MemberCount = 2;
        public const bool IsFlagEnum = false;

        public static string[] GetMemberNames() => _names ??= new string[] {
                "NE",
                "WO"
            };

        public static global::CasePatternEnum[] GetMemberValues() => _values ??= new global::CasePatternEnum[] {
                global::CasePatternEnum.One,
                global::CasePatternEnum.Two
            };

        public static Int32[] GetUnderlyingValues() => _underlyingValues ??= new Int32[] {
                0,
                1
            };

        public static bool TryParse(string value, out global::CasePatternEnum result, CasePatternEnumFormat format = CasePatternEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if ((format & CasePatternEnumFormat.Name) == CasePatternEnumFormat.Name)
            {
                if (value.Equals("NE", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::CasePatternEnum.One;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("WO", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::CasePatternEnum.Two;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & CasePatternEnumFormat.Value) == CasePatternEnumFormat.Value)
            {
                if (value.Equals("0", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::CasePatternEnum.One;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("1", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::CasePatternEnum.Two;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

#if NETSTANDARD2_1_OR_GREATER || NETCOREAPP3_1_OR_GREATER
        public static bool TryParse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, out global::CasePatternEnum result, CasePatternEnumFormat format = CasePatternEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if ((format & CasePatternEnumFormat.Name) == CasePatternEnumFormat.Name)
            {
                if (value.Equals("NE", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::CasePatternEnum.One;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("WO", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::CasePatternEnum.Two;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & CasePatternEnumFormat.Value) == CasePatternEnumFormat.Value)
            {
                if (value.Equals("0", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::CasePatternEnum.One;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("1", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::CasePatternEnum.Two;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

        public static global::CasePatternEnum Parse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, CasePatternEnumFormat format = CasePatternEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out global::CasePatternEnum result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value.ToString()}");

            return result;
        }
#endif

        public static global::CasePatternEnum Parse(string value, CasePatternEnumFormat format = CasePatternEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out global::CasePatternEnum result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

            return result;
        }

        public static bool IsDefined(global::CasePatternEnum input)
        {
            Int32[] _isDefinedValues = GetUnderlyingValues();

            for (int i = 0; i < _isDefinedValues.Length; i++)
            {
                if (_isDefinedValues[i] == (Int32)input)
                    return true;
            }

            return false;
        }

        private static string[]? _names;
        private static global::CasePatternEnum[]? _values;
        private static Int32[]? _underlyingValues;

    }
}
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis;

public static partial class CasePatternEnumExtensions
{
    public static string GetString(this global::CasePatternEnum value) => value switch
    {
        global::CasePatternEnum.One => "NE",
        global::CasePatternEnum.Two => "WO",
        _ => value.ToString()
    };

    public static string GetString(this global::CasePatternEnum value, CasePatternEnumFormat format = CasePatternEnumFormat.Default)
    {
        if ((format & CasePatternEnumFormat.Name) == CasePatternEnumFormat.Name)
        {
            if (value == global::CasePatternEnum.One) return "NE";
            if (value == global::CasePatternEnum.Two) return "WO";
        }

        if ((format & CasePatternEnumFormat.Value) == CasePatternEnumFormat.Value)
        {
            return ((Int32)value).ToString(System.Globalization.NumberFormatInfo.InvariantInfo);
        }

        return value.ToString();
    }

    public static bool TryGetUnderlyingValue(this global::CasePatternEnum value, out Int32 underlyingValue)
    {
        switch (value)
        {
            case global::CasePatternEnum.One:
                underlyingValue = 0;
                return true;
            case global::CasePatternEnum.Two:
                underlyingValue = 1;
                return true;
        }
        underlyingValue = default;
        return false;
    }

    public static Int32 GetUnderlyingValue(this global::CasePatternEnum value)
    {
        if (!TryGetUnderlyingValue(value, out Int32 underlyingValue))
            throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

        return underlyingValue;
    }
}
